Added a clientId field to track the unique session identifier for the client associated with the location.

Added comprehensive Javadoc comments to the class and main method to improve code documentation.

server/src/main/java/com/devicedetective.general_idea: Enable SockJS fallback for WebSocket connections to support browsers that do not support native WebSockets.
Configure allowed origin patterns to permit cross-origin WebSocket connections from any source.
Add JavaDoc documentation to the configuration class and its methods to improve code readability and maintainability.
Add inline comments explaining the purpose of specific configuration lines within the methods.

server/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Update spring-cloud-gcp version to 5.1.2, likely for compatibility or bug fixes, though the dependency itself is removed later.
Replace the Google Cloud starter dependency with a Spring Boot Redis starter, shifting the backend storage technology.
Remove the dependency management block for Spring Cloud and Google Cloud dependencies, cleaning up the POM as these are no longer used.

client/package-lock.json.general_idea: Add @stomp/stompjs to support STOMP protocol over WebSocket for messaging.
Add @types/sockjs-client for TypeScript definitions of the SockJS client.
Add sockjs-client to enable SockJS fallbacks for WebSocket connections.
Add uuidv4 to generate unique identifiers for clients or sessions.
Remove socket.io server dependency as it is not needed on the client side.
Remove socket.io-client to switch from Socket.IO to SockJS/STOMP protocol.

client/package.json.general_idea: Added @stomp/stompjs to support STOMP protocol over WebSocket for messaging.
Added TypeScript definitions for sockjs-client to ensure type safety.
Removed socket.io server dependency as the client no longer acts as a Socket.IO server.
Removed socket.io-client dependency in favor of SockJS/STOMP stack.
Added sockjs-client to enable SockJS transport layer for WebSocket fallbacks.
Added uuidv4 to generate unique identifiers for clients or messages.

Imported useId hook from React, likely for future accessibility or key generation needs.
Removed the MapService component from the home page layout.

client/src/components/SocketComponent.ts.general_idea: Migrated from a custom or Socket.IO-based socket implementation to SockJS and STOMP over WebSocket to align with the Spring Boot server backend.
client/src/components/SocketComponent.ts.human_impl: import SockJS from 'sockjs-client'; import { Client } from '@stomp/stompjs';

client/src/components/SocketComponent.ts.general_idea: Added state management for the STOMP client instance to handle connection lifecycle and message publishing.
Introduced state variables to store current locations and a map of client locations for the UI.

client/src/components/SocketComponent.ts.human_impl: const socket = new SockJS('http://localhost:8080/ws'); const stompClient = new Client({ webSocketFactory: () => socket }); stompClient.activate();

client/src/components/SocketComponent.ts.general_idea: Added subscription logic to receive location updates from the server topic '/topic/locations' and update local state.
Added logic to publish a registration message to the server immediately upon successful STOMP connection.
Created a helper function to send messages to the server via the STOMP client when connected.
